title: coula edulis
intro: Coula edulis, also known as the Coula tree, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the rainforests of West and Central Africa. The bark and seeds of the Coula edulis tree have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Coula edulis include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as the relief of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Coula edulis is typically prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and can also be made into a paste or infused oil for topical application.
